overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with green hair walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character traverses an orange pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highways, passing industrial structures, graffiti walls, and commercial billboards in a sunlit cyberpunk city.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with pedestrian crossing

events.description: crossing from paved street onto the orange elevated pedestrian walkway
turning slightly right to follow the walkway alongside the main road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection and entering the orange pedestrian walkway, following an NCPD officer

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer walking ahead on the walkway
pedestrian in yellow jacket walking in same direction

entered.detail: multi-level highway overpass dominating the skyline with steel trusses
raised pedestrian path with distinctive orange-brown paved surface
concrete industrial structure with metal railings and ventilation equipment
large digital screen displaying NEW EPISODE advertisement

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a sunlit urban intersection with the character crossing the street alongside an NCPD officer. The camera follows onto an elevated orange pedestrian walkway running parallel to a multi-lane road. Elevated highway structures dominate the skyline overhead, while industrial buildings line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pedestrian walkway with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: large red and blue graffiti reading LOCAL PATRIOTS comes into full view on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the walkway passing the graffiti-covered industrial wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large concrete wall with prominent red and blue graffiti reading LOCAL PATRIOTS with American flag pattern
metal scaffolding attached to the industrial building facade
tall illuminated tower with holographic elements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the enclosed industrial walkway, the character passes a massive wall covered in patriotic graffiti. The space feels narrower with the wall on the right and railing on the left. A distant futuristic tower becomes visible ahead, while the highway structure continues to cast shadows overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor beneath multiple highway overpass levels

events.description: silver sports car drives past on the left side of the walkway
passing a green street sign reading BRANDON mounted on a pole

agents.ego_description: walking along the walkway as vehicles pass by on the adjacent road, passing under multiple levels of highway infrastructure

notable_agents.action: silver sports car driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading BRANDON mounted on a metal pole
elevated pedestrian or vehicle bridge crossing overhead between buildings
plain concrete continuation of the industrial structure without graffiti

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues through an industrial corridor with multiple levels of highway infrastructure overhead. Vehicles pass by on the left while the character walks beneath the massive concrete overpasses. A street sign indicates the location as Brandon Street, and the environment transitions from graffiti-covered walls to plain industrial concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian walkway under overpass with large advertisements

events.description: entering a more commercial area with large illuminated billboards and advertisements
walking under a large overpass structure that temporarily blocks the sky view

agents.ego_description: walking through a commercial district beneath overpasses, passing large digital billboards and approaching a busy intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction toward the intersection

entered.detail: large green billboard advertising BURRITO XX with colorful food imagery
billboard with bold text IT'S BIG advertising burritos
tall building covered in digital advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a commercial area beneath the highway overpasses, dominated by large illuminated billboards advertising food products. The lighting becomes more mixed with shadows from the overhead structures. The character approaches a busier intersection with more pedestrian activity and futuristic buildings covered in digital advertisements visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban intersection that gradually transitions into a dense, commercial industrial corridor beneath massive highway overpasses. It begins with the character crossing a street alongside an NCPD officer before ascending onto an elevated orange pedestrian walkway that runs parallel to a multi-lane road. As the camera moves forward, the open intersection gives way to a narrower industrial path where a massive wall of patriotic graffiti lines the right side and a futuristic tower emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts into a concrete corridor beneath layers of highway infrastructure, passing a Brandon Street sign as the graffiti fades into plain industrial walls. Finally, the environment opens into a commercial zone dominated by large illuminated food billboards and increased pedestrian activity, with digital advertisements flickering on distant buildings under the shadow of the overpasses.
